parameters-en.Compress: Controls how much level the compressor detector circuit receives. More level = more compression. (Ampeg Opto Comp has a fixed threshold and ratio.)
parameters-en.Release: Controls how quickly the effect returns to unity gain after the input signal falls below the threshold. At 0.0, the release is 75 ms; at 10.0, the release is around 600 ms.
parameters-en.Mix: Controls the blend between the compressed and dry signals. At 0%, no compressed signal is heard; at 100%, no dry signal is heard. Values in between provide parallel compression.
parameters-en.Level: Sets the overall level of the block.
